special_mechanics.name: Magic Meter System
special_mechanics.description: Magic meter fills while player is not attacking and empties on attack. Empty/blue = melee only. Red (partial) = weak ranged magical attack. Full = strong ranged magical attack. Applies to player and magical allies (Priest, Wizard). Non-magical allies unaffected by meter status.

special_mechanics.name: Companion AI
special_mechanics.description: Computer-controlled ally follows player and mirrors player actions (attacks and jumps only when player does). Separate 4-bar HP meter.

special_mechanics.name: Full Screen Attack
special_mechanics.description: Can be performed instantly with magical book item or on demand at cost of 1 full HP bar.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - qualitative gameplay mechanics documented. No quantitative physics parameters (gravity, acceleration, velocities, sub-pixel precision) found in available sources. Game is action-focused hack-and-slash with light platforming, not precision platformer.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Magic Sword: Heroic Fantasy (gameplay section)
